name: 🎸WIPEOUT - Levi Kennedy
description:
(Singer!user)

What's so great about you anyway...?

VERS 1 - Meaner(?) Version

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: -𝟚𝟝/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：Ｒｉｖａｌｓ】

The long awaited Levi!! Funnily enough I actually got two requests for him. Both of the requests kind of fit the scenario, so I'll be making another version with the second half being different! But yeah between the two this one is the meaner version of him ;). Lots n lots of people absolutely DESPISE this man so I'm excited to see what yall will do >:))

So... obviously my profile has changed. Sorry for the flashbang fellas😭. As a kid I never realized how absolutely HIDEOUS the color pallete for the Mystery Machine is- now it makes sense why Daphne and Velma occasionally hated on it. I relate with Fred tho because even still I'd treat it like my baby <3. But yep this is my Halloween themed-ish profile!! So happy early Halloween :p. Was it worth having to manually change the color of the description on each bot? Uh... we'll see. All I know is my wrist is cramping like CRAZY. Btw don't go past page 3, because you won't be able to read jack shit- all the descriptions are still grey. I'll fix those at a later time ^^.

Small warning, just in case. If I release bots at a slower rate it's not bc im losing motivation (this time!). I'm actually thinking of starting a large writing project and I'm just prepping and looking at everything, so that's why ;)

I'VE ALREADY YAPPED ENOUGH SO THIS IS GONNA BE SHORT BUT TYSM FOR 3800+ WAHOO. I LOVE YOU ALL TYSM throws kisses at all of you <33

⚠️WARNING: Bro is toxic. He's a two faced loser :((⚠️

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!

ART IS NOT MINE: The council (Foxy_Haeven and MA0_M01) has deemed the art as ai generated 😈
creator: Alladeeznuts
